scenario.name: Hurricane Florence 2018 Scenario
scenario.summary: Synthetic East Coast exposure monitoring scenario built on the real Hurricane Florence 2018 track.
scenario.portfolioScale: 16 billion dollar state pension fund real estate portfolio
scenario.audience: Investment, risk, and leadership stakeholders, including the Chief Investment Officer and board level reporting.
scenario.disclaimer: Synthetic exposure demonstration built on the real Hurricane Florence 2018 storm track and the National Hurricane Center 2018 forecast cone. Property impacts shown here are not real observed Florence impacts and this is not an official weather product.
scenario.sourceNote: Track positions from NOAA HURDAT2 best track (AL062018). Forecast cone radii from the NHC 2018 track forecast cone definition.

tierDefinitions.description: Inside the Hurricane Florence 2018 forecast cone and included in leadership monitoring.
Outside the forecast cone used for this national portfolio review.
